Hero.name: Diego Rojas
Hero.description: Full Stack Developer focused on frontend, specialized in React, Next.js and TypeScript — building modular architectures, secure systems, and high-quality user experiences.

About.title: How I build software
About.subtitle: I focus on building scalable, secure, and maintainable applications, always prioritizing user experience and code quality.

security.title: Security first
security.description: I implement robust authentication, access control (RBAC), and best practices to protect data and systems.

performance.title: Performance & UX
performance.description: I optimize applications to be fast, smooth, and focused on delivering an excellent user experience while reducing load times.

arquitecture.title: Modular UI Architecture
arquitecture.description: I design scalable systems with reusable components and maintainable code to support growth and evolution.

Experience.title: My professional experience
Experience.subtitle: Over 4 years building scalable web applications, dashboards, and SaaS systems for international companies.

inetum.name: Inetum
inetum.description: I contributed to improving a backoffice catalog management system for Ésika, implementing new features and integrations to enhance usability, interactivity, performance, and security.

jabu.name: Jabu
jabu.description: I contributed to the development of JabuPay, a serverless fintech platform for digital cash management. Focused on implementing backend logic using serverless functions and secure authentication flows, while contributing to frontend consistency and system performance.

lapzo.name: Lazpo
lapzo.description: I contributed to the development of an enterprise-grade education platform that provides companies with tools to manage courses, lessons, instructors, and training programs. I worked across both frontend and backend, designing modern user interfaces and building scalable web applications.

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.subtitle: Applications focused on performance, scalability, and user experience.

neovim.name: Neovim config
neovim.description: Neovim configuration built entirely with Lua. This setup is prepared to support TypeScript projects using React and Vue.

Contact.title: Let's work together
Contact.subtitle: I’m available for remote opportunities, freelance projects, or collaborations on SaaS products.
